metadata.description: 1D upwind scalar advection on a periodic Cartesian grid. Exercises rule boundary_policy and time-varying bindings (RFC §5.2.8): velocity is per-cell, dt is per-step, dx is static. The rule rewrites grad(u, dim=i) to a backward-difference upwind stencil that references velocity and dx as bare bindings. The discretized model carries the rewritten equation; the rules array preserves boundary_policy and bindings verbatim across the discretize pipeline.
metadata.name: cfl_sine_advection
